sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5791" key="a)mfidone/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφιδονέω</orth>, <sense id="n5791.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">whirl round, agitate violently,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Ζέφυρος δένδρεα ἀμφιδονεῖ</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.668</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Marian.</author> </bibl>), cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4073.tlg001:5:121" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.121</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diod.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
